creator: demelier.david@gmail.com
text:
If you want to use sysutils/xfce4-power-manager you will see that it do not depends on sysutils/hal and if you start it it will says something like 

"HAL is not running"

Fix: 

add sysutils/hal as depend of sysutils/xfce4-power-manager
How-To-Repeat: start xfce4-power-manager
